scope: Calculate net present value, internal rate of return, and payback metrics for a discrete annual cash-flow investment screening case.

decision_context.system_boundary: Net Present Value Calculator evaluates one controlled capital-budgeting boundary inside Quote & SME Finance and excludes broad ERP, portfolio, or multi-project optimization workflows.
decision_context.single_operation_scope: Calculate and evaluate net present value using user-verified annual cash flows and a stated discount rate.
decision_context.decision_owner: operator, engineer, owner_cfo, or checker_auditor depending on selected profile mode
decision_context.decision_after_output: Decide whether to proceed, hold, revise, reject, or escalate the capital project based on NPV, IRR, and payback screening metrics.
decision_context.cost_of_wrong_decision: Wrong net present value screening can cause rework, wrong capital allocation, missed capacity, unsafe screening confidence, downtime, cash leakage, or unnecessary escalation.
decision_context.failure_mode_if_formula_wrong: False PASS, false REPRICE, false HOLD, hidden evidence gap, wrong unit conversion, or public formula leakage.
required_source_documents: user-verified source evidence for critical inputs
measurement or quotation record when available
calibration or uncertainty note when measured values are used
excluded_use_cases: replacement for official tax or regulatory advice
field_use_limitations: Exact acceptance limits must come from user-verified project, asset, standard, material, tax, or commercial source.
Public output must not expose internal formula expressions.

irreversible_commitment_metric.description: Net Present Value Calculator should not create an irreversible purchase, quote, production, safety, or capital commitment without source verification and review when thresholds are crossed.

standards.name: Principles of Corporate Finance (Brealey, Myers & Allen)
standards.role: Capital budgeting and NPV decision framework context

standards.name: Fundamentals of Corporate Finance (Ross, Westerfield & Jordan)
standards.role: Discounted cash-flow valuation and IRR interpretation context

standards.name: CFA Program Curriculum — Corporate Finance
standards.role: NPV, IRR, and payback screening methodology context

standards.name: User-entered currency context
standards.role: Single-currency cash-flow entry without FX conversion

calculation_basis.calculation_character: Protected server-side capital-budgeting kernel: computes NPV from discounted annual cash flows, optional IRR via bracketed root search, and undiscounted or discounted payback when recoverable within the horizon.

unit_conversion_contract.currency_policy: No currency conversion — user provides single-currency values

inputs.name: Initial Investment

physical_hard_bounds.semantic_error_message_min: Initial investment must be greater than zero.
physical_hard_bounds.semantic_error_message_max: Initial investment exceeds the permitted upper bound.

engineering_range.source: Typical industrial capex screening band; user must verify against the approved quote or business case.

reference_values.source: Up-front capital outlay at time zero.
reference_values.public_note: Enter the initial investment in project currency.

evidence_requirement.public_help_text: Verify the initial investment source before approval.

inputs.user_help_text: Up-front capital outlay at time zero. Must be greater than zero.
inputs.help_text: Up-front capital outlay at time zero.

inputs.name: Discount Rate (%)

physical_hard_bounds.semantic_error_message_min: Discount rate must be greater than zero percent.
physical_hard_bounds.semantic_error_message_max: Discount rate must be less than 100 percent.

engineering_range.source: Typical industrial hurdle-rate screening band; user must verify against company policy or WACC memo.

reference_values.source: Nominal discount rate or hurdle rate expressed as a percentage.

evidence_requirement.public_help_text: Verify the discount-rate basis before approval.

inputs.user_help_text: Nominal discount rate as a percentage. Must be between 0 and 100 exclusive.

reference_values.public_note: Cash flows beyond the horizon are ignored.

evidence_requirement.public_help_text: Verify the study horizon against the business case.

inputs.user_help_text: Study horizon from 1 to 10 whole years.

rules.message: All required input values must be provided.
rules.semantic_message: Enter a value for this required input before calculation.
The entered value may be outside expected range.

derating_contract.policy: No automatic derating for free screening tools.

formulas.name: Net present value from discounted annual cash flows
assumptions: Constant discount rate across the horizon
Initial investment occurs at time zero
No tax shield or inflation layer in the free screening model
limitations: Cash flows beyond the selected horizon are ignored
edge_cases: Zero discount rate is blocked at input validation
Missing sign change may prevent IRR bracketing
formulas.public_proof_summary: NPV is computed server-side by discounting each in-period cash flow and subtracting the initial investment.
formulas.protected_methodology_summary: Formula execution remains server-only and is not exposed in public UI.
formulas.checker_note: Verify cash-flow signs, currency consistency, and discount-rate basis before accepting the decision state.
formulas.validation_notes: Non-finite inputs are blocked before execution. Horizon must be an integer from 1 to 10.
formulas.calculation_assumptions: Uses Big.js decimal arithmetic for discounting and summation.

formulas.name: Internal rate of return approximation
assumptions: Same cash-flow stream as the NPV model
Bracketed root search when Newton-Raphson does not converge quickly
limitations: IRR may be undefined when NPV does not change sign across the search bracket
edge_cases: Non-conventional cash-flow patterns may yield multiple mathematical IRR roots; only one bracketed solution is reported
formulas.public_proof_summary: IRR is returned only when a valid bracket is found; otherwise a warning is issued without a numeric IRR output.
formulas.checker_note: Do not rely on IRR alone when cash flows change sign more than once.
formulas.validation_notes: IRR output is omitted when no bracket is found.
formulas.calculation_assumptions: Newton-Raphson with bisection fallback over a bounded rate range.

formulas.name: Undiscounted cumulative payback period
assumptions: Linear interpolation inside the recovery year
edge_cases: Returns no value when cumulative inflows never recover the investment within the horizon
formulas.public_proof_summary: Simple payback is reported only when undiscounted cumulative cash flows cross zero within the horizon.
formulas.checker_note: Compare against policy payback limits separately from NPV.
formulas.validation_notes: Output omitted when payback is not reached within the horizon.
formulas.calculation_assumptions: Fractional payback year is computed from the recovery-year inflow.

formulas.name: Discounted cumulative payback period
assumptions: Uses the same discount rate as the NPV calculation
Linear interpolation inside the discounted recovery year
limitations: May exceed the selected horizon even when NPV is positive
edge_cases: Returns no value when discounted cumulative cash flows never recover the investment within the horizon
formulas.public_proof_summary: Discounted payback is reported only when discounted cumulative cash flows cross zero within the horizon.
formulas.checker_note: Review discounted payback together with NPV and IRR.
formulas.validation_notes: Output omitted when discounted payback is not reached within the horizon.
formulas.calculation_assumptions: Discount each annual inflow before cumulative summation.

outputs.name: Net Present Value
outputs.public_explanation: Primary capital-budgeting decision metric for the project at the stated discount rate.
outputs.operator_explanation: Positive NPV supports proceeding when other constraints are satisfied.
outputs.engineer_explanation: Review cash-flow assumptions and discount-rate basis before approval.
outputs.owner_cfo_explanation: Use NPV sign as the primary accept/reject screening signal.
outputs.checker_explanation: Verify cash-flow evidence and discount-rate source before accepting the result.

outputs.name: Internal Rate of Return (%)
outputs.public_explanation: Secondary return metric when a valid IRR bracket exists.
outputs.operator_explanation: Compare IRR to the discount rate when reported.
outputs.engineer_explanation: Do not use IRR alone for non-conventional cash-flow patterns.
outputs.owner_cfo_explanation: IRR supplements NPV; absence of IRR indicates review is required.
outputs.checker_explanation: Confirm bracket validity and cash-flow sign pattern.

outputs.name: Simple Payback (Years)
outputs.public_explanation: Undiscounted cumulative payback period when recovered within the horizon.
outputs.operator_explanation: Useful liquidity screen without time-value adjustment.
outputs.engineer_explanation: Compare against policy payback limits separately from NPV.

outputs.name: Discounted Payback (Years)
outputs.public_explanation: Discounted cumulative payback period when recovered within the horizon.
outputs.engineer_explanation: May exceed simple payback and still leave NPV positive.
outputs.owner_cfo_explanation: Use with NPV for timing-sensitive approvals.

outputs.name: Decision State
outputs.public_explanation: PASS when NPV is positive, REVIEW when NPV is zero, REJECT when NPV is negative.
outputs.operator_explanation: Follow the suggested action based on the decision state.
outputs.engineer_explanation: Decision state reflects the NPV sign at the stated discount rate.
outputs.owner_cfo_explanation: Use the decision state to guide next actions.
outputs.checker_explanation: Verify the decision state logic against your approval policy.

business_impact_contract.description: Business impact analysis not available for free screening tools.

uncertainty_model.description: No uncertainty propagation for free screening tools.

sections.title: Execution Summary
sections.public_content: Calculation executed server-side. Results are for decision support only.

sections.title: Standards Context
sections.public_content: This calculation references engineering standards contextually. Full reproduction of tables is forbidden.

input_groups.description: Enter initial investment, discount rate, horizon, and annual cash flows.
